prompt: I'm designing a Phase 3 trial in first-line metastatic NSCLC. Single population, all-comers. Primary endpoint is overall survival (OS). 1:1 randomization. Control arm median OS is 14 months, and we're powering for a hazard ratio of 0.70. Start with one interim analysis at 70% of events using Lan-DeMets O'Brien-Fleming spending. We also want a non-binding futility boundary using HSD gamma=-4. Target power is 90%, one-sided alpha 0.025. Enrollment ramp: 5 patients/month for 3 months, then 15/month for 3 months, then 30/month steady state. Annual dropout is 5%. Minimum follow-up after last patient in is 6 months, minimum gap between analyses is 6 months. We need to stay under 450 patients total. Generate a report to summarize the design"
expected_output: A report summarize the design, with interim analysis plan, multiplicity diagram, boundaries across IAs and sample size and power assessments
assertions: sample N < 450, OR if N exceeds 450 the skill explicitly flags the constraint conflict and explains why (e.g., gap constraint required larger N)
simulated type I error within ±0.5pp of 0.025
IA/FA gap is evaluated and a second IA is suggested if gap > 18 months
In the recommended design, minimum follow-up after last patient in is 6 months
In the recommended design, minimum gap between analyses is 6 months
